chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1550 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel alongwith SIP Allah Dino Bhambhro SHO A-Section Tando Allahyar. -.-.-. Both petitioners are present in person alongwith their Counsel and petitioner No.1 Mst. Salma confirms that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Muhammad Yousuf out of her own free will. In this regard their nikahnama and affidavit of freewill are also available in record at pages 13 and 15 respectively. In the affidavit of freewill Petitioner No.1 has stated that she is living with her husband, the petitioner No.2, happily and said petitioner No.2 has neither kidnapped nor enticed her. Today learned State Counsel has filed parawise comments of official respondents/police officials wherein, inter alia, they have categorically refuted that any harassment was ever caused to the petitioners and they have further undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners whenever police officials are approached with such a request. The petitioners’ Counsel is satisfied with such an undertaking and therefore, this petition is disposed of with directions to police officials to discharge their duties in fair, just and reasonable manner and provide protection to petitioner in accordance with law whenever they are approached with such a request. Private respondents No.4 to 7 are also restrained from causing any harassment of whatever nature to the petitioners.

The petitioners’ Counsel is satisfied with such an undertaking and therefore, this petition is disposed of with directions to police officials to discharge their duties in fair, just and reasonable manner and provide protection to petitioner in accordance with law whenever they are approached with such a request. Private respondents No.4 to 7 are also restrained from causing any harassment of whatever nature to the petitioners. JUDGE Ali Haider
